columns.column_name: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 5 | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: Four treatment-related deaths occurred during the course of chemotherapy in the ADT plus D arm including two neutropenia-related deaths (both in the HVD subgroup). The total number of patients in the ADT plus D arm is 192 (from Table 1 on page 3). Therefore, 4/192 patients experienced treatment-related Grade 5 adverse events.
